style_a.name: 灰暗现实主义
style_a.prompt_suffix: handheld camera, film grain, desaturated cold tones, blue-grey color palette, urban isolation, dimly lit

style_b.name: 东方赛博神话
style_b.prompt_suffix: epic cyber mythology, golden and neon blue palette, weightless atmosphere, digital particles, majestic scale

music_sync.lyrics: 跌倒一千次 爬起一千零一次 / 每行代码都是 不认输的样子 / [X-WOW徽标燃烧]

atmosphere.overall_mood: 跌倒与爬起的不屈精神，高潮段尾声——X徽标从代码中锻造而成
atmosphere.lighting: 战斗损伤的火光 + X徽标的炽烈金光
atmosphere.weather: 数字空间（能量碎片飘散）

video_prompt: The warrior falls and rises repeatedly with each coded blow, resilience montage, culminating in a burning X-WOW emblem forged from code, epic brand moment, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 副歌第三段，节奏中带有韧性，最后走向X-WOW品牌时刻
bgm.instruments: 重型节拍 + 管弦乐铺底 + 人声层叠
bgm.dynamics: 强劲持续→品牌时刻庄严感

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 金翼战士遭遇巨大的暗红色数据风暴冲击，被打得后退

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 被暗红色数据风暴冲击，身体后仰

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 即使强大了，仍然会面对更强的挑战
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 暴风冲击声 + 铠甲受创声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden winged cyber warrior being hit by a massive dark red data storm, thrown backward, armor cracking with sparks flying, struggling against the force, damaged but not defeated, dramatic backlit, epic struggle, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 战士坠落——铠甲碎裂散落，翅膀折断，重重摔在数字大地上

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 坠落撞击地面，铠甲碎片飞溅

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 跌落的瞬间——碎裂的荣光
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 沉重的撞击声 + 金属碎裂声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A fallen cyber warrior crashed on a dark digital ground, golden armor fragments scattered around, wings broken and dissolving, impact crater, overhead view of the fallen figure surrounded by debris, golden sparks fading, defeat moment, dark atmosphere, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 倒地的战士指尖触碰地面——接触点闪出一行代码

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 手按地面，手指关节发白地用力

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 即使跌倒——指尖仍在写代码
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Extreme close-up of a fallen warrior's hand pressing against dark digital ground, knuckles white with effort, a line of golden code flickering to life at the point of contact, broken armor pieces around the hand, ground-level camera angle, determination in the smallest gesture, cyber mythology detail, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 战士缓缓站起——破损的铠甲开始自动修复，金色纹路重新点亮

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 挣扎起身，铠甲碎片飞回身体自动修复

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 1001次爬起——这就是不认输的定义
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 铠甲修复的金属组装声 + 能量回充声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A warrior slowly rising from a kneeling position, shattered golden armor fragments flying back and reattaching to the body, golden circuit patterns reigniting across the repairing armor, bruised but unbroken, dramatic upward camera tilt as they stand, self-repair sequence, resilience personified, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 快速蒙太奇——多次跌倒爬起的闪回画面叠加

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 反复跌倒→爬起→战斗→跌倒→爬起

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 蒙太奇——不断跌倒又爬起的循环
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 快速剪辑的节奏冲击声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Dynamic montage composition showing multiple overlapping frames of a golden warrior falling and rising, repeated cycle of defeat and recovery, each iteration the armor growing stronger, motion blur and afterimage effects showing the cycle, rapid editing feel, resilience montage, golden and dark tones, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 彻底站起的战士——铠甲比之前更华丽，伤疤化为金色纹路

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 完全站立，铠甲升级——伤痕全部转化为金色战纹

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 每一道伤疤都是勋章——铠甲因磨砺而更强
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A fully restored and upgraded golden cyber warrior standing tall, the armor now even more magnificent with battle scars transformed into beautiful golden vein patterns like kintsugi, a defiant confident smile visible through the visor, upward angle emphasizing strength, stronger-than-before energy, cyber mythology warrior reborn, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 战士将手中的代码之剑竖直插入地面——金色能量沿地面向四面扩散

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 双手握剑，猛力插入地面

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 剑插大地——如同立下誓言
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 剑入地的金属重击声 + 能量扩散声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden cyber warrior plunging a blazing code sword vertically into the digital ground, golden energy shock ripples spreading outward in concentric rings across the dark surface, planting-a-flag moment, solemn and powerful, epic gravity, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 能量从剑的插入点向上喷涌——金色能量柱冲天而起，在空中开始凝聚

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 双手仍握着插在地面的剑，仰头看能量柱上升

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 能量冲天——即将形成最终标志
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A towering golden energy beam erupting upward from a sword planted in the ground, the warrior at the base looking up, the energy column reaching high into the digital sky and beginning to shape itself at the top, golden sparks and code fragments swirling upward, epic vertical composition, cosmic scale, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 能量凝聚完成——天空中巨大的X-WOW徽标如太阳般燃烧发光，照亮整个数字世界

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 在巨大X徽标下渺小的身影，双翼重新展开

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: MV品牌时刻——X-WOW如太阳般照耀
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 庄严的合唱和弦 + 持续的能量嗡鸣
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A colossal burning X-WOW emblem blazing like a golden sun in the digital sky, illuminating the entire digital world with warm golden light, a tiny silhouette of a winged warrior standing below looking up at the emblem, the X-WOW logo radiating beams of golden light in all directions, brand anthem visual, epic scale, ultimate cyber mythology moment, 16:9 aspect ratio
